name: EU SCC Module 2 (Controller to Processor)
scope: Transfers from an EEA controller to a non-EEA processor.
required_ancillary_documents: Annex I (List of Parties, Description of Transfer, Competent Supervisory Authority)

cites.citation: Commission Implementing Decision (EU) 2021/914 of 4 June 2021, OJ L 199
